title: Avariterra
description: Explore a burnt land filled with deadly enemies, new structures, and unique items to discover
body:
###                                       **ABOUT THIS MOD**
![Lost the way](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2bce443f74b28cbf82a8e24e7c85c860b38f343_0.webp)

The landscape stretches out as a barren wasteland of blackened earth and drifting gray ash.
the horizon is jagged with the rusted, twisted remnants of a forgotten war. Collapsed mangled barricades jut from the soot-covered ground, serving as the only obstacles in this desolate field. The fires that once consumed this place have left nothing but scorched rubble and deep craters. An eerie, unnatural silence hangs over the ruins, heavy with the memory of the destruction that stripped the land bare.

Mobs list:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  ![collector ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1c6e2056000f77dcf2fe5a2066a1d4e9c7d2693_0.webp)
### The Collector
a neutral merchant mob found in the Burnt Land. 

Its main purpose is trading players can right-click a Collector to open a trading interface and exchange items. Although it is passive by default, it  will attack players if provoked, the Collector can often be seen sitting on the ground.

![sol tha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/209d293ce126c736a9d02eb84cd301176966ddbe_0.webp)
### Soul Thralls
A summoned undead minion that serves the player. It does not spawn naturally in the world; instead, it is created through a specific interaction using the Carnifex Axe.

To summon a Soul Thrall, the player must first right-click a target mob with the Carnifex Axe. If the  mob is then killed and a Soul Thrall immediately spawns from its location to fight alongside the player.

![spri vess](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a10adce9a61fa930b1989820a9152edc0a73022f_0.webp)
### Spirit Vessels
A spectral entity that manifests as a byproduct of death caused by specific creatures. It does not spawn naturally in the environment.

Instead, a Spirit Vessel emerges from the location of a living entity immediately after it is killed by either  Carnifex or  Absolon. 

![absolon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f38a36e111bb443c1bae3bf96136c941387d626_0.webp)
### Absolon
A hostile mob found in the Burnt Lands. It appears as a humanoid figure 

It carries a large weapon known as the Absolon Cross. In combat, Absolon is a melee attacker that deals heavy damage. 

![executioner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41848ba9698092dd52ece17c91fa880e4a591ad4_0.webp)
### Carnifex
A formidable hostile mob found in the Burnt Lands.

It wields a massive two-handed weapon known as the Carnifex Axe. The Carnifex is a heavy melee damage dealer, Like Absolon.

![true collector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/437a185d23b9971561ce9381ebd4c300c859efbc.png)
### # True Form of the Collector ( from Darkest Dungeon )

A hostile boss, it is attracted to players who are carrying a large amount of items, serving as a punishment for hoarding.

In combat, it acts as a Summoner, calling upon minions to swarm the player instead of fighting alone. It also possesses a Life Steal ability, allowing it to heal itself whenever it damages the player. To defeat it, you must manage the crowd of enemies and deal damage faster than it can regenerate.

![wander](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a643a6c0886697db64d97ab9b35d927dcc0f2981.png)
### Lantern Keeper

A neutral humanoid entity found roaming the Burnt Land. It will attack other monsters (like Zombies) to protect itself but remains passive towards the player unless provoked.

Despite its strength, it lives in fear of the greater evils; it will actively run away if it spots The Collector, Absolon, or other entities.

![Souls Keeper (Next update)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7f4f72382bb9986467ba8f4b02573ba5e61537d.png)
### Souls Keeper (Next update)
</details>


Weapons list :
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![car axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ccb380c342273915f491dcf27a1a943f394598e.png)

**Carnifex Axe**

A weapon obtained from the Carnifex. It offers immense power and the ability to command the Soul Thralls, but operates on mechanic that drains the wielder's vitality.

![ab cross](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3913fa9eae3b5b0d389bb924eb4b27bf8e401f61.png)

**Absolon Cross**

A weapon obtained from  Absolon. special mobility mechanic. By holding Right-Click to charge the weapon, the wielder channels dark energy. Upon releasing the charge , the user performs a Dark Leap.

</details>
